title: Penalties on Non-Banking Financial Companies for Regulatory Violations
description: <cite index="20-1,20-2,20-10,20-11">The RBI imposed penalties on six NBFCs for regulatory violations. Avail Financial Services Limited was fined ₹6.20 lakh for violating governance and credit/investment concentration norms. Muthoot Finance Limited was fined ₹5.80 lakh for violating KYC Directions and failing to regularly review risk categorization of customer accounts.</cite>
